productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Swing White Blue Shoe
description: The lotto Swing is an all-round tennis shoe that works wonders with your performance levels on all terrains - be it firm ground, indoor or grassy courts. So gear up to hit those stunning aces with this classic tennis shoe.Upper Synthetic upper for extended durability Perforated upper for breathability Mesh padded tongue for snug Fit and breathability Synthetic lace for snug fit and durability Cushioned collar for extremely comfortable grip and comfort Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorption Removable footbed for easy maintenance, added durability and allows to fit an orthotic Padded sockliner for snug fit and comfort grip Arched footbed for ergonomic fit Outsole Carbon rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior grip on hard terrain Pivot point below the toe counter and heel area for easy 180 degree movement of the foot Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
